name: HEMANGIOMA OF ADRENAL GLAND
definition: rare benign vasoformative stromal tumor of adrenal gland
distribution: highly vascular mass with multiple peripheral nodular areas of marked enhancement after
discriminating_features: calcifications (28-87%) from previous hemorrhage / multiple CHARACTERISTIC phleboliths
often large mass (usually > 10 cm in diameter, up to 22 cm) owing to their indolent nature
highly vascular mass with multiple peripheral nodular areas of marked enhancement after
NO complete fill in of contrast material

general: often large mass (usually > 10 cm in diameter, up to 22 cm) owing to their indolent nature
highly vascular mass with multiple peripheral nodular areas of marked enhancement after
NO complete fill in of contrast material
calcifications (28-87%) from previous hemorrhage / multiple CHARACTERISTIC phleboliths
MR: mass hypointense relative to liver on T1WI + central hyperintensity ← hemorrhage /
usually markedly hyperintense on T2WI, especially in central portion
variable appearance after hemorrhage, thrombosis, necrosis, fibrosis
